{{CargoOrgan
|name=Bloodstained Spire
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10668
|idx=25
|description=The spiraled horn radiates danger, its polished surface glinting coldly to proclaim its razor edge. Faint bloodstains only deepen the chill...
|skill=Trigger Blood Demon Scythe, dealing DMG equal to 150.4% of ATK, and increase next round's lifesteal rate by 13%!
|hp=1412
|def=128
|atk=124
|rush=238
|gene1=In Demon Form, Fire DMG +120
|gene2=In Demon Form, {race} ATK +40
|gene3=In Demon Form, {race} RUSH +40
|gene4=In Demon Form, CRIT +10%
|gene7=In Demon Form, CRIT +10% (Awakened)
|}}
